signals.headline: Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3]
signals.raw:
Jerome Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][3]

Powell stated in recent remarks that if his successor is not confirmed by the end of his term as chair (May 2026), he would serve as chair pro tem until confirmation, per legal precedent[1][2][3]. This addresses leadership uncertainty amid President Trump's nomination of Kevin Warsh,
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?
